basics.name: Geovany Batista PoloLAGUERRE
basics.label: Data Scientist | Applied Mathematics
basics.summary: Data Scientist with a strong foundation in applied mathematics, focused on transforming complex data into actionable insights for strategic and operational decision-making.

work.name: Universite des Antilles
work.position: Research Intern - Mathematical Analysis and Simulation of an Ultrasound Propagation Model
work.summary: Research internship in applied mathematics focused on mathematical analysis and numerical simulation of nonlinear acoustic wave propagation.
highlights: Studied the Westervelt equation and its quasilinear strongly damped wave structure
Analyzed the PDE with energy methods and well-posedness considerations
Developed operator splitting methods (including Strang splitting)
Implemented a Python finite-difference solver and conducted stability and convergence experiments

work.name: Universite Quisqueya
work.summary: Teaching mathematical foundations for computer science students with applications in computing and technology.
highlights: Teach logic, algebra, calculus, and discrete structures
Develop analytical thinking, rigorous reasoning, and problem-solving skills
Connect abstract mathematics to data science and software engineering use cases

work.name: Universite Quisqueya
work.position: Teaching Assistant in Data Science & AI
work.summary: Support students in immersive data science training aligned with industry-oriented curriculum.
highlights: Mentor students in Python, SQL, statistics, machine learning, and data visualization
Support capstone projects from data wrangling through model deployment
Run Q&A sessions and code reviews with personalized feedback

work.name: Solutions S.A.
work.summary: Transform data into actionable insights for strategic and operational decision-making.
highlights: Design and maintain ETL pipelines with SQL Server and Microsoft Fabric
Build and optimize interactive Power BI dashboards and reporting
Contribute to RADAR BI application reporting and reliability
Apply statistical analysis and machine learning methods for insights
Progressed from internship to full Data Analyst role in November 2023

work.name: Self-Employed
work.summary: Private mathematics tutoring focused on problem solving and exam preparation.
highlights: Clarified complex mathematical concepts with tailored pedagogy
Supported students for exams and structured problem-solving methods
Helped students improve confidence and academic performance
